title: Snapshot
description: Certain facts as of a date (plan.md §3.2). Treated as immutable once saved — the factual anchor a projection starts from. Take a new snapshot when fresh statements arrive; keep old ones as history.

taxStatus.description: Drives withdrawal tax treatment (plan.md §3.3): taxDeferred=ordinary income + RMDs; roth=tax-free; taxable=cap gains on gain, needs costBasis; hsa=tax-free for medical; cash=principal untaxed.

costBasis.description: Taxable accounts only. Gain = balance - costBasis; only the gain is taxed on withdrawal.
